question:
Rompuses are mean. Rompuses are zumpuses. Each zumpus is not happy. Each zumpus is a numpus. Each numpus is not temperate. Each numpus is a tumpus. Tumpuses are not large. Tumpuses are yumpuses. Every yumpus is earthy. Each yumpus is a jompus. Jompuses are blue. Every jompus is a wumpus. Wumpuses are not dull. Wumpuses are impuses. Each vumpus is dull. Impuses are sour. Impuses are dumpuses. Alex is a numpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Alex is not dull.
